t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: User-facing instrument display name from Trade.InstrumentMetaData. More descriptive than Name (e.g., 'Apple Inc.' vs 'Apple'). NULL for instruments without metadata entries. (Tier 2 -- SP_Dim_Instrument, etoro_Trade_InstrumentMetaData)
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Instrument display name for this row. Crude oil futures all map to 'Crude Oil Future'.
t1_fidelity_table.loss: Dropped examples ('Apple Inc.' vs 'Apple'), dropped NULL semantics, dropped origin (Trade.InstrumentMetaData). Upstream wiki tags this as Tier 2 (SP_Dim_Instrument), not Tier 1. Additionally, CASE transform in SP_M_CME_Reporting normalizes crude oil variants, making this Tier 2 in the CME table.

t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: ETL metadata: timestamp when row was last written.
t1_fidelity_table.loss: No upstream exists — column is GETDATE() in SP_M_CME_Reporting. Wrongly tagged Tier 1; should be Tier 2 (SP-computed).

issues.problem: DDL declares Monthly_Volume as bigint NULL but wiki says decimal(38,6). Type mismatch will mislead analysts about precision and storage.

Tagged Tier 1 from DWH_dbo.Dim_Instrument but: (a) Dim_Instrument wiki tags InstrumentDisplayName as Tier 2 (SP_Dim_Instrument, join-enriched from Trade.InstrumentMetaData), (b) SP_M_CME_Reporting applies a CASE transform normalizing crude oil variants. Should be Tier 2. Description is paraphrased — dropped examples, NULL semantics, and Trade.InstrumentMetaData origin.
Tagged Tier 1 'ETL metadata (blacklist canonical)' but it is GETDATE() in SP_M_CME_Reporting — no upstream inheritance. Should be Tier 2.

Elements table uses non-standard format (Column|Type|Description|Tier|Notes) instead of required (#|Element|Type|Nullable|Description). Missing Nullable column — all 5 DDL columns are NULL-able but this is not shown. Tier annotation should be inline at end of description, not a separate column.
Missing tier legend in Section 4, no ETL ASCII pipeline diagram, no tier breakdown footer, no Phase Gate Checklist. Section 1 lacks row count and date range.

verdict.regeneration_feedback: Re-run with: (1) Fix Monthly_Volume type from decimal(38,6) to bigint to match DDL. (2) Re-tag InstrumentDisplayName as Tier 2 (SP_M_CME_Reporting CASE transform on Dim_Instrument.InstrumentDisplayName). (3) Re-tag UpdateDate as Tier 2 (SP_M_CME_Reporting GETDATE()). (4) Restructure Elements table to # | Element | Type | Nullable | Description format with inline (Tier N — source) at end of each description. (5) Add Tier Legend subsection in Section 4. (6) Add ETL ASCII pipeline diagram: Dim_Position + Dim_Instrument + Dim_Customer → #Ins → #Positions → DELETE+INSERT → Dealing_CME_Reporting. (7) Move row count (690) and date range to Section 1. (8) Add tier breakdown footer: Tier 1: 0 | Tier 2: 5. (9) Add Phase Gate Checklist or explicitly note P2/P3 skipped.
